text:
In the quiet of the woods, ancient and serene, a young girl named Orielle trekked on whimsical adventures. One day, she discovered a old oak tree that whispered secrets of the forest. It told her about a magical pond where every swirl revealed a hidden treasure deep inside a waterfall-shaped rock.

Orielle's heart pounding, she dived in and found a tarnished medallion, which felt oddly warm in her hand. Returning to the oak tree, she meditated beneath it and imagined it guiding her to a wise old owl.

The owl sang a gentle song, and Orielle learned it was guardian of the treasure. She hid the medallion in her boot, promising to protect it.

Months passed. Orielle grew brave. One night, she dreamt of the moonlit treasure. The next morning she woke with a silver necklace twinkling like stars. Rushed outdoors, she found a stream flowing with glitter.
